records.chapter: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer
records.author: Ḥusayn b. Saʿīd al-Ahwāzī
records.englishText: 201. It has been narrated that the brother of al-Tirbal (i.e. Ibrahim ibn Jamil al-Kufi) said: I heard al-Sadiq (a.s) saying: Allah holds some on the earth as sacred: the Book of Allah, the Messenger of Allah, the Ahl al-Bayt, the Ka'bah and a Muslim and a Muslim and a Muslim. (He repeated thrice).
records.arabicText: 201 - وعن أخي الطربال قال: سمعته يقول: ان لله عز وجل في الأرض حرمات، حرمة كتاب الله، وحرمة رسول الله، وحرمة أهل البيت، وحرمة الكعبة، وحرمة المسلم وحرمة المسلم، وحرمة المسلم.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 201. It has been narrated that the brother of al-Tirbal (i.e. Ibrahim ibn Jamil al-Kufi) said: I heard al-Sadiq (a.s) saying:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Allah holds some on the earth as sacred: the Book of Allah, the Messenger of Allah, the Ahl al-Bayt, the Ka'bah and a Muslim and a Muslim and a Muslim. (He repeated thrice).
